subcodes.first_line: O 'Azíyyih! God willing, mayest thou ever hold fast unto that which God hath ordained and cling unto His most sacred hem [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عزیه انشاء الله لازال بما اراده الله متمسک باشی و بذیل اقدسش متشبث
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
